pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at some discrepancies from our recent audit in the Rotterdam warehouse. Can you help me figure out what might be going on? 

Here is the data for the electronic component bins:

Bin ID | Item Description | System Qty | Physical Count | Variance
A-102 | Micro-controller v4 | 450 | 447 | -3
A-105 | Logic Gate IC | 1200 | 1200 | 0
A-109 | Resistor Pack (10k) | 5000 | 4982 | -18
B-201 | Voltage Regulator | 300 | 298 | -2
B-205 | Capacitor Kit | 150 | 150 | 0

The variances are small but they happen every month. What could be causing these specific types of losses?

pool.baseline:
hey, i'm seeing a bunch of 500 errors on our /api/v1/checkout/complete endpoint. it's super intermittent, happens maybe 5% of the time. here is a snippet of the logs from one of the failures:

[2023-10-27 14:22:01] ERROR: RequestID: a1-b2-c3-d4 | Endpoint: /api/v1/checkout/complete | Status: 500
[2023-10-27 14:22:01] Exception: ConnectionTimeout during database write operation
[2023-10-27 14:22:01] Traceback:
  File "/app/services/checkout_service.py", line 88, in process_payment
    db.session.commit()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/sqlalchemy/orm/session.py", line 1432, in commit
    self._do_commit()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/sqlalchemy/orm/session.py", line 1455, in _do_commit
    self._flush()
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/sqlalchemy/engine/base.py", line 1105, in _execute_exception
    raise exc.DBAPIError("Connection timeout occurred while attempting to commit transaction", ...)

any idea what might be causing this if it's only happening sporadically?
